code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Retail_OrderManagement] --> AppInitialization
    
    AppInitialization --> PerformanceAssessment : Start Performance Monitor
    
    PerformanceAssessment --> DeviceCapabilityCheck
    DeviceCapabilityCheck --> InitialModeSelection
    
    InitialModeSelection --> UltraFastMode : Low-end Device
    InitialModeSelection --> FastMode : Mid-range Device
    InitialModeSelection --> BalancedMode : High-end Device
    InitialModeSelection --> HighQualityMode : Premium Device
    
    state UltraFastMode {Retail_OrderManagement] --> QuarterResolution
        QuarterResolution --> BasicFaceDetection
        BasicFaceDetection --> MinimalProcessing
        MinimalProcessing --> LowBatteryUsage
        LowBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state FastMode {Retail_PointOfSale] --> HalfResolution
        HalfResolution --> FaceDetection
        FaceDetection --> BasicNSFWDetection
        BasicNSFWDetection --> ModerateBatteryUsage
        ModerateBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state BalancedMode {Retail_OrderManagement] --> FullResolution
        FullResolution --> CompleteFaceDetection
        CompleteFaceDetection --> FullNSFWDetection
        FullNSFWDetection --> GenderClassification
        GenderClassification --> OptimalBatteryUsage
        OptimalBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state HighQualityMode {Retail_OrderManagement] --> EnhancedResolution
        EnhancedResolution --> AdvancedFaceDetection
        AdvancedFaceDetection --> EnhancedNSFWDetection
        EnhancedNSFWDetection --> DetailedGenderClassification
        DetailedGenderClassification --> ContentDensityAnalysis
        ContentDensityAnalysis --> HighBatteryUsage
        HighBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    PerformanceMonitoring --> ContinuousMonitoring
    
    state ContinuousMonitoring {Retail_PointOfSale] --> CPUUsageCheck
        CPUUsageCheck --> MemoryUsageCheck
        MemoryUsageCheck --> BatteryLevelCheck
        BatteryLevelCheck --> ThermalStateCheck
        ThermalStateCheck --> NetworkLatencyCheck
        NetworkLatencyCheck --> PerformanceDecision
    }
    
    PerformanceDecision --> MaintainCurrentMode : Performance Good
    PerformanceDecision --> DegradePerformance : Performance Issues
    PerformanceDecision --> ImprovePerformance : Resources Available
    
    state DegradePerformance {Retail_CouponSystem] --> ReduceDetectionFrequency
        ReduceDetectionFrequency --> LowerResolution
        LowerResolution --> DisableNonEssentialFeatures
        DisableNonEssentialFeatures --> IncreaseCacheUsage
        IncreaseCacheUsage --> OptimizeMemoryUsage
    }
    
    state ImprovePerformance {Retail_OrderManagement] --> IncreaseDetectionQuality
        IncreaseDetectionQuality --> HigherResolution
        HigherResolution --> EnableAdditionalFeatures
        EnableAdditionalFeatures --> ReduceCacheDependency
        ReduceCacheDependency --> EnhancePrecision
    }
    
    DegradePerformance --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    ImprovePerformance --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    MaintainCurrentMode --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    
    state AdaptiveAdjustment {Retail_PointOfSale] --> ApplyChanges
        ApplyChanges --> TestNewSettings
        TestNewSettings --> ValidatePerformance
        ValidatePerformance --> UpdateConfiguration
    }
    
    AdaptiveAdjustment --> ContinuousMonitoring : Return to Monitoring
    
    %% Emergency scenarios
    ContinuousMonitoring --> EmergencyMode : Critical Performance Issue
    
    state EmergencyMode {Retail_PointOfSale] --> MinimalDetection
        MinimalDetection --> CriticalFeaturesOnly
        CriticalFeaturesOnly --> MaximumCaching
        MaximumCaching --> EmergencyOptimization
        EmergencyOptimization --> GradualRecovery
    }
    
    EmergencyMode --> ContinuousMonitoring : Performance Recovered
    
    %% User-triggered changes
    ContinuousMonitoring --> UserModeChange : User Changes Settings
    
    state UserModeChange {Retail_OrderManagement] --> ValidateUserChoice
        ValidateUserChoice --> ApplyUserSettings
        ApplyUserSettings --> WarnIfIncompatible
        WarnIfIncompatible --> AcceptOverride
    }
    
    UserModeChange --> ContinuousMonitoring : Settings Applied
    
    %% Battery-specific optimizations
    ContinuousMonitoring --> BatteryOptimization : Low Battery Detected
    
    state BatteryOptimization {Retail_CustomerLoyalty] --> ReduceProcessingFrequency
        ReduceProcessingFrequency --> DisableBackgroundFeatures
        DisableBackgroundFeatures --> MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks
        MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks --> EnableDeepCaching
        EnableDeepCaching --> BatterySaveMode
    }
    
    BatteryOptimization --> ContinuousMonitoring : Battery Level Improved
    
    %% Thermal management
    ContinuousMonitoring --> ThermalThrottling : Overheating Detected
    
    state ThermalThrottling {Retail_PointOfSale] --> ReduceProcessorUsage
        ReduceProcessorUsage --> IncreaseProcessingIntervals
        IncreaseProcessingIntervals --> DisableGPUAcceleration
        DisableGPUAcceleration --> CooldownPause
        CooldownPause --> ThermalRecovery
    }
    
    ThermalThrottling --> ContinuousMonitoring : Temperature Normal
    
    note right of UltraFastMode
        Basic protection with minimal resource usage
        - Face detection only
        - 224x224 resolution
        - 500ms intervals
        - ~2% battery/hour
    end note
    
    note right of BalancedMode
        Recommended mode for most users
        - Full feature set
        - Native resolution
        - 2000ms intervals
        - ~5-8% battery/hour
    end note
    
    note right of HighQualityMode
        Maximum accuracy and features
        - Enhanced processing
        - Content density analysis
        - 3000ms intervals
        - ~12-15% battery/hour
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个零售场景下的实时人脸检测系统状态机，核心要能根据设备性能自动切换工作模式。先从入口开始，系统启动后应该有个应用初始化的状态。
明白，应用初始化之后直接做性能评估吗？还是说先有个启动监控的过渡？
对，初始化完成后启动性能监控，然后进入设备能力检查，最后根据检查结果做初始模式选择。这个分支很关键，要覆盖低端到旗舰四种设备。
好的，我先把主线画出来：初始化→性能评估→设备检查→模式选择，然后分出四条路径分别对应UltraFastMode、FastMode、BalancedMode和HighQualityMode。
UltraFastMode是给低端机用的，里面要包含四分之一分辨率、基础人脸检测、最小化处理和低电池消耗这几个子状态。
注意到UltraFastMode的入口标注是Retail_OrderManagement，但FastMode用的是Retail_PointOfSale，这是有意为之还是笔误？
应该是Retail_OrderManagement，FastMode也统一改成Retail_OrderManagement吧，保持入口一致性。FastMode内部用半分辨率、标准人脸检测、基础NSFW检测和中等电池消耗。
已修正入口。现在BalancedMode作为推荐模式，内部结构我按完整分辨率、完整人脸检测、完整NSFW检测、性别分类和最优电池消耗来设计。
没错，BalancedMode是大多数用户的选择。HighQualityMode给旗舰机，需要增强分辨率、高级人脸检测、增强NSFW检测、详细性别分类，还要加个内容密度分析。
HighQualityMode的电池消耗应该标为高用量，然后所有模式最后都汇聚到性能监控。我在右侧给UltraFastMode、BalancedMode和HighQualityMode加上注释说明具体参数如何？
很好，注释里写上分辨率、检测间隔和每小时耗电百分比。性能监控之后要进入持续监控状态，这个状态内部需要包含CPU、内存、电池、温度和网络延迟的检查。
持续监控画好了，五个检查项串联，最后到PerformanceDecision。这个决策点要分出三条路：性能良好维持现状、性能问题降级、资源充足提升性能。
DegradePerformance和ImprovePerformance这两个复合状态内部结构比较复杂，DegradePerformance要包含降低检测频率、降低分辨率、禁用非必要功能、增加缓存使用和优化内存。
DegradePerformance的入口标注是Retail_CouponSystem，和其他模式不一致，需要调整吗？
这是个错误，DegradePerformance应该也是Retail_OrderManagement入口。ImprovePerformance同样用Retail_OrderManagement，内部包含提升检测质量、更高分辨率、启用额外功能、减少缓存依赖和增强精度。
已统一入口。现在三条路径都汇聚到AdaptiveAdjustment，这个状态内部有应用变更、测试新设置、验证性能和更新配置四个步骤。
对，AdaptiveAdjustment完成后要返回持续监控，形成闭环。但还需要考虑几种特殊情况：紧急模式、用户手动切换、电池优化和温度节流。
紧急模式从持续监控进入，触发条件是严重性能问题。内部结构是最小检测、关键功能-only、最大缓存、紧急优化然后逐步恢复？
没错，紧急模式入口用Retail_PointOfSale，恢复后回到持续监控。用户手动切换也是类似的跳转逻辑，但内部是验证用户选择、应用用户设置、警告不兼容、接受覆盖。
用户模式切换画好了。电池优化状态的入口是Retail_CustomerLoyalty，这个和其他不一样，是特意设计的吗？
应该是Retail_OrderManagement，保持统一。电池优化内部包含降低处理频率、禁用后台功能、最小化CPU密集型任务、启用深度缓存和电池节省模式。
已修正。温度节流状态用Retail_PointOfSale入口，内部是降低处理器使用、增加处理间隔、禁用GPU加速、冷却暂停然后温度恢复。
所有特殊模式处理完都要能回到持续监控，形成完整的循环结构。现在检查一下，UltraFastMode的注释里分辨率是224x224，间隔500ms，耗电2%每小时对吧？
是的，BalancedMode注释是原生分辨率、2000ms间隔、5-8%耗电，HighQualityMode是增强处理、内容密度分析、3000ms间隔、12-15%耗电。
内容密度分析是HighQualityMode特有的功能，用于分析画面复杂度。我们再确认一下所有状态的入口标注是否都正确了？

检查完毕：UltraFastMode、BalancedMode、HighQualityMode、ImprovePerformance、UserModeChange用Retail_OrderManagement；FastMode、ContinuousMonitoring、EmergencyMode、AdaptiveAdjustment、ThermalThrottling用Retail_PointOfSale；DegradePerformance和BatteryOptimization已修正为Retail_OrderManagement。
FastMode的入口应该也是Retail_OrderManagement吧？之前第7回合说的是统一改成Retail_OrderManagement。
您说得对，我漏掉了FastMode。现在修正：FastMode入口改为Retail_OrderManagement。这样所有主业务线模式入口都统一了，只有持续监控、紧急模式、自适应调整、温度节流这些系统级状态用Retail_PointOfSale。
完美。整个状态机覆盖了从设备初始化到动态性能调整的全生命周期，四种工作模式、四种特殊处理场景，还有详细的性能参数注释。可以定稿了。
